programs.title: Road Less Traveled
programs.desc: In stunning Lago di Garda Jonathan attempts to pull off a paragliding maneuver which almost put him in a wet grave last summer. Nearby, in the city of Bolzano, he joins a crack helicopter rescue force to pull another paraglider off the cliffs.

programs.title: Selling Mega Mansions
programs.desc: Peter, a newly divorced father, is looking for a fresh start; Dallas trust fund couple, Brad and Heather, want to upgrade their family to their first mega mansion.

programs.title: Dream Purchase
programs.desc: Dream Purchase follows the realization of an American dream; everyone has dreamed of owning that special thing; for some its a classic car, for others a luxury home and for some even a helicopter or luxury yacht.

programs.title: Distant Shores
programs.desc: Sheryl and Paul Shard voyage to exotic destinations.

programs.title: Boys Toys
programs.desc: Host Amber Wyatt tests some of the highest performance toys covering all terrains.

programs.title: Blue World
programs.desc: Visiting Sy the octopus at New England Aquarium in Boston and Lucy and Odie at Seattle Aquarium; diving in Puget Sound to survey wild octopus populations; an octopus fight.
